name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Petition: Defend the Mueller investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | | "Trump Trusts Putin's Denial, but Seven U.S. Intelligence Groups Blame Russia for Election Meddling" -_New York Times_ , 7/16/2018
---
**Yes, you read that right -- days after Robert Mueller indicted 12 Russian nationals for hacking our election, President Trump publicly sided with Vladimir Putin over American intelligence agencies.**
I wish I could say I'm shocked, but at this point, very little shocks me. Trump has undermined America's institutions from day one, and his allies in the Republican Party have openly talked about shutting down Robert Mueller's investigation into Russian meddling and collusion.
[**Now more than ever, we need to defend the special counsel 's investigation. We're aiming for 10,000 Democratic supporters to stand up and protect Robert Mueller's investigation -- add your name to mine and make your voice heard.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f12/622b7b5b/1bfbd647/307b9b18/3968893478/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180719")
Think about it -- Trump is willing to attack Gold Star mothers, American POWs, people with disabilities, Mexicans, Haitians, the press, migrant families, and our own intelligence services.
_But he won 't attack Vladimir Putin. That's one line Trump's too scared to cross._
[**The special counsel 's investigation continues to produce new facts and new indictments -- it's working. Republicans are trying to shut it down before we can learn the whole truth. Sign my petition and demand that Republicans stop attacking the Mueller investigation.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f12/622b7b5b/1bfbd647/307b9b18/3968893478/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180719")
Thanks,
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f12/622b7b5b/1bfbd647/307b9b1b/3968893478/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Team Smith
subject: We don't have dark money or special interests on our side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We're counting on you.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b99a/c1f7015/6b00d24d/11425566/1575141245/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180722_em") Friend-- We're facing an opponent who is self-funding hundreds of thousands of dollars, super PACs and billionaire donors who could write a check and swamp Minnesota with ads at any moment, and a President who is desperate to win this state after coming within 1.5 points in 2016. Our only defense is grassroots supporters like you who are willing to give what they can so we can fight back. We don't have dark money or special interests on our side -- we just have you. That's why we're asking: **[Can we count on you to rush a contribution of $3 or more before our deadline Wednesday at midnight so we have the resources to take on any attacks Republicans throw our way?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b99a/c1f7015/6b00d24d/11425567/1575141245/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180722_em-ND")** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b99a/c1f7015/6b00d24d/11425567/1575141245/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180722_em-ND")**** Grassroots donors will be the difference in this race between victory and defeat. Between turning the Senate blue and putting an end to Trump's agenda or giving Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump _even more_ power. Every dollar you give will matter. And there is too much at stake to let up, even for a second, team. ****[Can you rush a contribution before our deadline so we can take on Donald Trump, Republicans, and any dark money attacks we might face?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b99a/c1f7015/6b00d24d/11425567/1575141245/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180722_em-ND")**** Counting on you, Team Smith

And there is too much at stake to let up, even for a second, team. ""** Counting on you, Team Smith

name: Peter Joffrion
subject: Wanted to share some photos from AL-05
body:
Hello there,

The best part about running for Congress in AL-05 is having the opportunity to connect with motivated voters who are ready to elect a responsive leader who will stand up for our working families across the district.

I’m a firm believer that actions speak louder than words, so I’ve made it a point to actively listen to the needs and concerns of the people of North Alabama. Thanks to my good friend Jim Teed for the next few shots from our town hall in Scottsboro. In this second photo, I’m chatting with a constituent and Alabama’s Dem candidate for Attorney General Joe Siegelman after we both spoke.

I always love any time I can get over to Cassie's Cafe in Hazel Green for breakfast and the historic Trowbridges restaurant in Florence. At an event at Grissom High School, I had the chance to catch up with students and talk with them about the issues at the top of their minds. It's incredibly inspiring to see the number of young folks taking action this cycle.

Connecting with voters one-on-one is my top priority in this campaign. I know that together, we can make a real difference here in North Alabama. I had a wonderful time meeting participants at the Juneteenth celebration in Huntsville.

I’m looking forward to the next three months on the trail traveling all over North Alabama to reach the voters we need to flip this seat. I’m committed to working as hard as I can to give incumbent Rep. Mo Brooks a real run for his money.

I hate to ask, but if you’re able and would like to help us turn AL-05 blue, I’d be obliged if you could pitch in to help fund our efforts. You can donate directly here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterjoffrion4alabama?refcode=20180723

Thanks so much and I hope to see you on the trail!

-Peter

Peter Joffrion for Congress
P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/cdc2e8fd-2b8c-e811-80c2-000d3a12bbb1/08f82917-898e-e811-80c2-000d3a12bbb1?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY4MjkxNy04OThlLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u0ZHDfW1Ql4ThD6UXH1nH8oQPTIU4MBoJFULZ14A_5A=&id=110339827&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

name: Mel Hall
subject: Watch: our first TV ad of the general election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

We just launched our first TV ad of the general election -- and I want you to be among the first to see it.

**Watch our new ad, "Values," to hear more about why I'm running for Congress, and then please share it with your family and friends to spread the word.**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yUa340rb4DPfuvfGZwOrBuKgd1NdaP78ClWwomFhLWU=/3rgHOwVh5cqQ6qEhWgHnvAk_mwzTSUn9sCWBODUY8Mk=)
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.myngp.com/el/yUa340rb4DPfuvfGZwOrBuKgd1NdaP78ClWwomFhLWU=/3rgHOwVh5cqQ6qEhWgHnvAk_mwzTSUn9sCWBODUY8Mk=) | [SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.myngp.com/el/yUa340rb4DPfuvfGZwOrBuKgd1NdaP78ClWwomFhLWU=/9t0dC_Fq0kK8ttVSrUUWYx9TILY4Wtii7scj3XKmqdo=)**

My dad taught me that what you do speaks much louder than what you say -- and that's how I've tried to live my life.

That's what motivated me to become a minister. Later, when I led a health care company focused on patient care, it's what motivated me to raise wages and create over 800 good-paying jobs here in Indiana.

Now we need leaders in Congress who will fight for the people they're elected to serve -- not their own special interests. I'll take the values I've learned throughout my life to fight for Hoosier families.

Thank you for being part of this campaign,

Mel Hall

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---

Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/yUa340rb4DPfuvfGZwOrBuKgd1NdaP78ClWwomFhLWU=/SFXIYt2VTO_tBuYecLfhosQf77Uf-FrMGa9XoxTWj0M=).

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: personally asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hey there -
**_The Washington Post_ has reported that Nevada is Democrats' "best pickup opportunity" - and that we have no room for error in the fight for Senate control.**
**Democrats need to go all-in in Nevada, especially with President Trump here last month fundraising for Dean Heller and raising nearly $500,000.** With a recent poll showing us neck and neck with GOP extremist Dean Heller, this is shaping up to be one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country.
There's no doubt about it: If you're a Democrat who cares about taking back the Senate and protecting Obamacare and the future of the Supreme Court, then we need you with us now. Democrats _cannot_ take back the Senate if we lose here in Nevada, **so we 've _got_ to hit every single one of our fundraising goals. And right now, we're falling way short of meeting our goal.**
**[Team, I'm personally asking you to chip in whatever you can before midnight to help us make up our shortfall so we can flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate for Democrats:](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1c5/4fbb2af3/7b4fc8c5/5e8b6b67/4249823080/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg4OC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk888-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Make a Difference This Weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
This weekend, Republicans from across the nation will be coming together to make a difference in our communities by kicking off the National Week... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/nationalweekofaction-467093?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **Do You Have An Hour This Weekend?**
_Joe Donnelly Just Ranked Most Vulnerable Senate Democrat!_
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=67d417fa8d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | This weekend, Republicans from across the nation will be coming together to make a difference in our communities by kicking off the _**National Week of Action**_!

Here in Indiana, **_we'll be out talking to voters at their doors and on the phones_** , letting them know about our all-star 2018 Republican ticket led by U.S. Senate candidate Mike Braun!
---
| [TAKE ACTION THIS WEEKEND! ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3bc1f59713&e=1acd9bb3d6 "TAKE ACTION THIS WEEKEND! ")
---
| That's where you come in! _**This weekend, would you be willing to donate just an hour of your time to help get the word out about our candidates, and this critical election?**_

The Washington Post just _**ranked Democrat Joe Donnelly as the most vulnerable Senate Democrat**_ up for re-election this year, and our work this summer will help make sure that Indiana provides the firewall protecting our conservative majority in the U.S. Senate.

But we need your help. _We simply cannot allow Democrats to take the Senate and obstruct President Donald Trump's agenda. _

Sign up here, and this weekend let's make sure Indiana is doing its part to help Republicans continue to shake things up in Washington:
[https://gop.com/national-week-of-action](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f4bf9e26f7&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Joe Donnelly Just Ranked Most Vulnerable Senate Democrat! | | | This weekend, Republicans from across the nation will be coming together to make a difference in our communities by kicking off the National Week of Action! Here in Indiana, we'll be out talking to voters at their doors and on the phones , letting them know about our all-star 2018 Republican ticket led by U.S. Senate candidate Mike Braun! | "TAKE ACTION THIS WEEKEND! " | That's where you come in! This weekend, would you be willing to donate just an hour of your time to help get the word out about our candidates, and this critical election? The Washington Post just ranked Democrat Joe Donnelly as the most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for re-election this year, and our work this summer will help make sure that Indiana provides the firewall protecting our conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. But we need your help. We simply cannot allow Democrats to take the Senate and obstruct President Donald Trump's agenda. Sign up here, and this weekend let's make sure Indiana is doing its part to help Republicans continue to shake things up in Washington: We'll see you this weekend! | "SIGN UP NOW FOR THE NATIONAL WEEK OF ACTION!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2017, All rights reserved. name: PA Victory 2018
subject: quick budget update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e60c6/51dbcc2a/1913ab90/3a62284/260379162/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Team -- the numbers are against us.

Republicans have made no secret about coming after Pennsylvania's Senate seat this year. Bob has prevented them from repealing the Affordable Care Act, voted against their anti-middle-class tax plan and is taking a strong stand against their corporate Supreme Court nominee -- it's not surprising that the Republican establishment wants to replace him with a rubber stamp for President Trump's dangerous and divisive agenda.

With big donors like the Koch brothers planning to spend seven figures in battleground states like Pennsylvania this year, we need to be prepared to fight back. We're planning out our budget for the rest of the campaign, and we need to raise $9,000 online each day to keep up with our opponent and his outside money. **[Can you chip in today to help meet our daily goal?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180723_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** **[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180723_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Bob knows he can count on you, when it matters. He fights for the best interests of all Pennsylvanians, not just the top 1%. **[Show Bob you're on his side in this fight -- donate $5 or more to push back against Republican attacks today. ](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180723_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** **[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180723_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180723_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Quincy Jones
subject: Want to see a real leader, huh?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
It's time to stop talking and start doing.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a278/7ab0e2c4/7ff93cb6/349bea96/3725475252/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-real-leader?refcode=OHQ07238A") Friend -- Leadership is a funny thing -- a lot of people think they are leaders because they have managed to make a lot of money. Others think they are leaders because they're famous, or they're just _near_ famous people. Let me tell you something: A symphony conductor knows more about how to lead than most people. Leadership is about bringing people together to build something better, and that's exactly what Ben does. **I 'm so excited to see a born organizer and leader like Ben run for governor, because he's exactly the type of person we need in higher office. **[**We need to make sure Ben has the funds to fight: Donate $5 or more now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a278/7ab0e2c4/7ff93cb6/349bea96/3725475252/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-real-leader?refcode=OHQ07238A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a278/7ab0e2c4/7ff93cb6/349bea91/3725475252/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-real-leader?amount=5&refcode=OHQ07238A&express_lane=true")

| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a278/7ab0e2c4/7ff93cb6/349bea9c/3725475252/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-real-leader?refcode=OHQ07238A&express_lane=true")
---
The music business has always had a little bit of politics in it -- artists and musicians have always reflected the issues of the era and meshed it into their music.
And I've seen a lot of change since I joined the scene in the 1950s, but the things we're fighting for -- our civil rights, a cleaner environment, better education, safer and more equal communities -- they've been the same for years.
It's time to stop talking about fixing them, and just fix them. Ben has the plan to do it now, and I've seen it work when he led the NAACP. It's just the kind of leader he is, and that's something you can't teach. It's in his heart and soul to keep giving back to the communities and people who have given so much to him.
[**I 'm ready to make real change, are you? If so, donate $5 or more today and let's help Ben win!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a278/7ab0e2c4/7ff93cb6/349bea96/3725475252/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-real-leader?refcode=OHQ07238A")
Thanks,
Quincy Jones

name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Austin Petersen campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hello Friend, Here is the campaign update for Austin Petersen this week. Thank you so much for all of your help! The election is only a few short weeks away. We can’t thank you enough for your support. **Campaign events:** We were busy last week! We door knocked in Columbia, St. Joseph, and made phone calls all across the state. We are reaching THOUSANDS of voters every single day with Austin’s message. It is really exciting to see the momentum building. We also attended the Boone county fair and arranged big volunteer teams to persuade some voters. **Local Media:** Austin was interviewed on a few local radio shows last week. You can catch up with the campaign by listening to his interview on [**Pete Mundo’s show here**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fuser-53894534%2F7-18-austin-petersen-joins-pete-mundo-on-kcmo%3Futm_source%3Dsoundcloud%26utm_campaign%3Dshare%26utm_medium%3Dfacebook&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072318_update&n=1). And you can watch Austin on [**Gary Nolan’s show by clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FAP4Liberty%2Fvideos%2F1895700770488894%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072318_update&n=2) **“HOA Hawley” Removes Petersen campaign sign:** I’m not sure where to start with this one it is so embarrassing and pathetic. One of Josh Hawley’s neighbor put up an Austin Petersen yard sign. Hawley proceeded to walk up to his neighbor and threatened to report him to his HOA if he did not take down the yard sign. [**You can read the full story here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fthelibertarianrepublic.com%2Fsenate-candidate-dubbed-hoa-hawley-after-yard-sign-complaint%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072318_update&n=3) Hard time accepting the fact that the voters don’t like you, Josh? **Bitcoin’s best hope:** Austin Petersen is the most pro cryptocurrency candidate running for Senate in 2018. The crypto community is beginning to pick up on that fact. Austin opposes federal regulation and control of cryptocurrencies. [**71 Republic reported on Austin’s pro-cryptocurrency record last week. You can read that article here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2F71republic.com%2F2018%2F07%2F16%2Faustin-petersen-bitcoins-best-chance%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072318_update&n=4) Thanks again, Friend! Heather Coil
Communications Director
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

---
Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072318_update&n=5))

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

[Privacy Policy](http://www.austinpetersen.com/privacy?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072318_update&n=6) | [Unsubscribe](http://www.austinpetersen.com/unsubscribe?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072318_update&n=7)

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Tearing down barriers to work
body:
| |
---
The White House • July 23, 2018
## **The Day Ahead**
President Donald J. Trump hosts Made in America Day at the White House, celebrating products made in the United States. [Watch live at 3 p.m. ET. ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIzLjkyODY3MTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMy45Mjg2NzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# Tearing down barriers to work
**“We must tear down unnecessary barriers to work,”** Labor Secretary Alex Acosta wrote Friday. “Excessive licensing forces individuals, like barbers, teachers and nurses, who move from state to state, to give up their career or retake certifications and pay high fees to get back to work.” He called on states to reevaluate their approaches. **On the heels of last week’s** Pledge to America’s Workers, where more than 20 companies committed to investing in 3.8 million opportunities for our Nation’s workforce, Secretary Acosta ran through the myriad other ways the Trump Administration is expanding opportunity for all Americans:
> • The President has restored a commonsense approach to regulation, which should “focus on protecting health and safety,” Secretary Acosta says.
> • The Administration is helping transition Americans who are reentering society from prison to jobs, releasing $84.4 million in grants to community groups.
> • A new Executive Order in May helps alleviate the burden for military spouses as their families are reassigned from one state to another.
> • Thanks in part to tax cuts and reform, record unemployment lows were set for African-Americans, Hispanic-Americans, and Asian-Americans.
[Secretary Acosta: The time to invest in the American workforce is now. ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIzLjkyODY3MTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMy45Mjg2NzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/reinvesting-american-workforce/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **More** : [What the Pledge to America’s Workers means](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIzLjkyODY3MTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMy45Mjg2NzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/pledge-to-americas-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# America’s reenergized space program
**Friday marked Space Exploration Day** , which commemorates the 1969 landing of the lunar module Eagle. Six hours after it touched down, Neil Armstrong became the first human in history to walk on the surface of the Moon. **“Since I took office,** my Administration has refocused our Nation’s space program on returning to the Moon, growing space commerce, leading the way for a human mission to Mars, and unveiling the secrets of our universe,” President Trump wrote Friday. “The exploration and development of space represent the best of American values, and we seek to ensure those values have a permanent place beyond Earth.” [Read the President’s full message for Space Exploration Day. ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIzLjkyODY3MTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMy45Mjg2NzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/presidential-message-space-exploration-day/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **More****:** [America will once again reach for the Moon—and beyond](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIzLjkyODY3MTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMy45Mjg2NzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/america-will-reach-moon/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Keegan Barber
**A section of the Lockheed Martin F-35 aircraft is delivered to the South Lawn of the White House for the Made in America Product Showcase** | July 21, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIzLjkyODY3MTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMy45Mjg2NzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIzLjkyODY3MTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMy45Mjg2NzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIzLjkyODY3MTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMy45Mjg2NzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&http://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/new?preferences=true)
The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

name: Tiffany Muller, End Citizens United
subject: Our political system is broken.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Enough with the corporations, super PACs, and dark money organizations spending millions of dollars in our elections.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b9d3/c1f7015/6b08f991/114257d4/3817639509/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180723_em-A") Friend, Our political system is broken. It's completely rigged for the wealthy. And the only way to fix it is for grassroots activists like you to come together and say ENOUGH. Enough with the corporations, super PACs, and dark money organizations spending millions of dollars in our elections. Enough with politicians who cater to the needs of whoever can write the biggest check. And enough with a rigged system that says it's better to give a tax break to a CEO than health care to a family who needs it. **At End Citizens United we 're fighting back and saying ENOUGH by electing leaders who will lead this fight for us in Washington -- and today we're standing with Tina Smith. She will fight to amend the Constitution to overturn the awful _Citizens United_ decision and she will take on the wealthy interests rigging our system.** Now, she has a big deadline coming up in two days and special interests across the country are targeting her race. We want to show everyone when her fundraising reports become public that grassroots activists are willing to stand with leaders who take on big donors. That's why I'm asking you: **[Will you rush a contribution to Tina before her deadline at midnight on July 25th? Every dollar shows you are saying ENOUGH with a rigged system that favors the wealthy over the few.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b9d3/c1f7015/6b08f991/114257d5/3817639509/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180723_em-A-ND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b9d3/c1f7015/6b08f991/114257d7/3817639509/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180723_em-A-ND-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b9d3/c1f7015/6b08f991/11425729/3817639509/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180723_em-A-ND-exp&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b9d3/c1f7015/6b08f991/1142572a/3817639509/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180723_em-A-ND-exp&express_lane=true&amount=100")

| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b9d3/c1f7015/6b08f991/1142572b/3817639509/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180723_em-A-ND-exp&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b9d3/c1f7015/6b08f991/1142572c/3817639509/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180723_em-A-ND-exp&amount=25")
---
We are facing special interests who can write checks in the millions, and they can only be defeated if a tremendous amount of grassroots progressives like you step up and join Tina in this fight.
This is the only way we can build a movement to finally overturn Citizens United and take back our country from special interests.
Keep fighting,
Tiffany Muller
President, End Citizens United

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Stand up for Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Friend, **For more than half a century, Americans have kept the promise of Medicare.** And today, I'm asking you to stand up and show your support for this vital program. [**Add your name to mine and send a message to Republicans in Washington -- don 't cut Medicare to pay for the Republican tax giveaway!**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f13/622b7b5b/1bf03a49/307b9b07/367062404/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180719d") More than four million Floridians depend on Medicare not only for medical treatment and prescription drugs but also for peace of mind. Now, Republicans in Washington want to cut Medicare and use the money to pay for tax giveaways to the wealthy few. And that's unacceptable. [**Don 't let Republicans break the promise of Medicare. Sign our petition and stand up for what's right.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f13/622b7b5b/1bf03a49/307b9b07/367062404/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180719d") At its heart, Medicare is a promise between generations -- the idea that we will take care of one another, no matter what. I believe we're a nation that keeps its promises and I won't stop fighting until Medicare's opponents are defeated. I'm proud to have you fighting with me. Thanks, Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: In 2006, we flipped 31 House seats. In 2018, we only need to flip 23.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4d5f/24c69fd9/2790f4dd4/1885c8f7/582295213/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES53N_digital_email_20180723_2006House_inact&source=WQEFES53N_digital_email_20180723_2006House_inact")
---

Peter,

Democrats need 23 seats to take back the House.

That might sound like a tall order, but it wouldn't be the first time we've turned that many seats blue.

In 2006, Democrats flipped a whopping **_31 seats_** and took control of the House during the midterms.

We can do it again.

We've endorsed 42 pro-choice Democratic women for red-to-blue House seats who can send Republicans packing.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the House in November.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4d5f/24c69fd9/2790f4dd4/1885c8f0/582295213/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180723_email_2006House?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFES53N_digital_email_20180723_2006House_inact&source=WQEFES53N_digital_email_20180723_2006House_inact")**

An unpopular Republican president. Unprecedented threats to health care. A scandal-plagued Republican Party. Sound familiar?

We can't help but notice the similarities between 2018 and 2006.

President Trump has a low approval rating just like President Bush did at the same point in the cycle. Democrats are leading generic ballot polls just like they were in 2006.

And Republicans have to protect a lot more seats than Democrats this year.

Plus, there's incredible enthusiasm for our candidates.

We can repeat the successes of 2006 this year, but we can't just rely on polls and dynamics leaning in our candidates' favor.

Make sure our women have all the resources they need to win each and every one of the 23 seats we need to take back the House.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the House:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Repeat-2006](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4d5f/24c69fd9/2790f4dd4/1885c8f1/582295213/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180723_email_2006House?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgRepeat2006&utm_campaign=WQEFES53N_digital_email_20180723_2006House_inact&source=WQEFES53N_digital_email_20180723_2006House_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4d5f/24c69fd9/2790f4dd4/1885c8f2/582295213/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180723_email_2006House?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFES53N_digital_email_20180723_2006House_inact&source=WQEFES53N_digital_email_20180723_2006House_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

name: Osmack for Missouri
subject: Medicare Rx
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kA0vFLZOyTKv-TaYU-qJTLUhe9ibCi-wJD0isexlgYU=/gBFDgSdLLnI-yzXiW_SvLM8gsfRoXFqd-T5CX1FaUOc=) Friends, Here is a glimpse into what healthcare could, and should, look like: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kA0vFLZOyTKv-TaYU-qJTLUhe9ibCi-wJD0isexlgYU=/47qEVBIeywht64OFdn1T96QdJ-Vp_osFDbORxG2QupM=?v=bDfCWoVO5tM&index=5&list=UUDE55bHo7uB-M5kKjVecQMw&t=0s) I picked up a prescription today. It cost $371.89 before insurance, but after insurance, I only paid $3.00. You should not have to join the Army or become a Member of Congress to receive affordable, quality healthcare. We urgently need Medicare for All. This is more than possible...this is our future. With her vote to defund the ACA, Ann Wagner proved that she does not prioritize the well-being of her constituents. If elected, I will support legislation to expand affordable healthcare to everyone so that getting sick doesn't mean going broke, declaring bankruptcy, or forgoing care. We can make Medicare for All a reality. Let's send leaders to Congress who will fight to make that happen. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kA0vFLZOyTKv-TaYU-qJTLUhe9ibCi-wJD0isexlgYU=/GElcbZ8H7t6mkqaZq2ZCCPc27sOQN9rBfu1QvISaDno=)

name: Steve
subject: What's your advice?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ Hey! It’s Steve from the National Republican Congressional Committee.
I know you probably have a lot of ideas on how to help Conservatives win in November, and I could really use your advice. [ **Tell us Now** ](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA0LWFlYzU3NmVlOTU3NzRlZmQ5MzE3MjE3M2ViN2Y5NWQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QubnJjYy5vcmcvZWxlY3Rpb24tZGF5LXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1QQUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsUHJvc3BlY3QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNzIzX1BBRS1HT1AzX1N0ZXZlJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgwNzIzX1doYXRzWW91ckFkdmljZQ&K=5jdM2fLCqJ0kOrdu9ClTNw) Our team has created a quick survey to help us get advice from strong supporters like you about how we can win in November. **[Take the Election Day survey now.>>](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA0LWFlYzU3NmVlOTU3NzRlZmQ5MzE3MjE3M2ViN2Y5NWQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QubnJjYy5vcmcvZWxlY3Rpb24tZGF5LXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1QQUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsUHJvc3BlY3QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNzIzX1BBRS1HT1AzX1N0ZXZlJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgwNzIzX1doYXRzWW91ckFkdmljZQ&K=u-_MRFoyQwJiVDqWjKOtEg)**
As you know, this election is crucial. Nancy Pelosi and the radical left are pushing millions of dollars into attack ads and lies. They are funneling millions in cash to radical extremists and doing all they can to attack our President and his Conservative majority.
My team and I need you to tell us your thoughts on how we can win in November. It takes just a brief moment of your time, but it would be a huge help to our efforts.

This is BAD.
**Donald Trump was in Nevada recently, fundraising for GOP Sen. Dean Heller, who just had his BEST fundraising quarter yet. And a recent poll has shown Democrats trailing by one point in the race that will decide Senate control.**
This couldn't have happened at a worse time: Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ says "a bad 2018 could condemn Democrats to the Senate minority indefinitely," and _The Washington Post_ says Democrats' best path to a Senate majority includes winning here in Nevada.

So the truth is, we could lose this race _and_ any chance we have of regaining Senate control if we don't turn things around ASAP.
**That's why, with the future of the Supreme Court and Obamacare on the line, we're counting on top supporters like you to step up with a donation immediately.** **[_Please, give $5 right now - every dollar you can before our critical deadline - to win in Nevada and take back the Senate for Democrats:_](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1e9/4fbb2af3/7b5916d5/5e8b652d/3144741109/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgxMy1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk813-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Tori Taylor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | This just in -- **We outraised our opponent nearly 2-to-1 last quarter. And we did it with an average contribution of just $21.59 from over 30,000 grassroots supporters.** This is huge news and I couldn't be more proud of this grassroots team. But here's the unfortunate reality. We live in a post-_Citizens United_ era. If we want to send Congressman Ted Budd packing this fall, we need to work even harder. Congressman Budd has been bought by the special interests to do their bidding in Washington. They will defend him with smear campaigns and attack ads against Kathy, and pour unlimited amounts of dark money into North Carolina. Momentum may be on our side, but we must prepare for what comes next. [**If you can, please match our average contribution of $21.59.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427809/e3b7d3/5c4236c6/2555f12e/786746430/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180723?refcode=kme180723_m&recurring=true&amount=21.59") | | | [DONATE $21.59](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427809/e3b7d3/5c4236c6/2555f12e/786746430/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180723?refcode=kme180723_m&recurring=true&amount=21.59")
---
It is going to be an incredibly close race and every single grassroots contribution will matter. It is up to us to send a bold, new leader to Washington who will look out for the interests of hard-working people in North Carolina's 13th District.
[**It is going to take all of us working together to get Kathy all the way and win this thing. Chip in $21.59 today.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427809/e3b7d3/5c4236c6/2555f12e/786746430/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180723?refcode=kme180723_m&recurring=true&amount=21.59")
Keep up the fight!
Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: Molly
subject: reaching out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
Just walked out of a meeting with my team, friends. We need to raise $4,100 before our midnight match deadline, and I need your help.
If we're going to win in New Hampshire and take back the governor's office for Democrats, we must take full advantage of this rare match opportunity to have every dollar go twice as far.

New Hampshire is headed in the wrong direction under Chris Sununu. I'm running to replace him and make the corner office accountable to families like yours - not special interests.

**That's why I'm refusing ANY donations from corporations. But**** if we're going to flip New Hampshire blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give every dollar you can, right now. **
**Friends, I wouldn't ask if this weren't important. You can use this link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyforgovernoremails](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48bd/d0ce7de/512b0ab3/9cd3f9a/2018680696/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNzUtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk75-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Jacqueline Burns
subject: Re: Jessica Morse for Congress Campaign
body:
Hi Peter,

I just wanted to follow-up. We will be phone banking in Truckee on Wednesday, and canvassing on Saturday and Sunday from 9-12 and again from 12-3pm. Would you be able to join us?

We are also having a 100 Days Out celebration this Sunday, July 29, in Truckee - we'd love to see you there! Can you believe it is only 100 days from the election already?

Best,

Jackie

There are so many different ways you could support our efforts, so I hope to hear back from you! The first opportunity to help would be this weekend - we are doing canvassing in Truckee both Saturday and Sunday - and we will also be phone banking this Wednesday. Would you be able to join us this weekend or on Wednesday?

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: What I just did
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Team --
I wanted to take a moment to talk with you about early voting here in Tennessee. At the end of the day, this election is going to be decided on who shows up to vote at the ballot box. **Until July 28th (this Saturday), you’ll have the option to cast your ballot at an early voting location for the August 2nd Primary.**
In fact, just this morning, my wife, Andrea, and I voted near our home here in Nashville.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1717409/9119849/809256093?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmEzNGMxNS1jZjhlLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e40hp7yeCeHigNcf5GjDtW8--oLdfAKYaYrlqMiahms=&refcode=em180723-vote-miss&recurring=true)
The Primary is going to make it official for me to be on the November 6th ballot as we challenge the status quo in Washington, and it’s critical that you, your family, your friends, and your neighbors get the chance to vote. Early voting gives you the chance to vote on your time and lock in your vote.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Re: this is serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend -- Did you get a chance to read Eric's email yesterday?

He told us the bad news that one of my opponents has raised over $1 million dollars. The good news is that almost all of it came from out-of-state, special interests donors - not from the people in our community. My opponent will use that cash to run a negative campaign and drag me through the mud between now and November.

We're not leaving anything to chance because this seat belongs to the people of this district, not a small group of people trying to buy another vote in Congress.

[**Will you help us fight back by making a donation now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YGttNq2tk1PR2saB-wmuuTIpMEI3SCYhkMCI9FuU1qc=/ENvkqM1yL9nDPlV-cdaOg9t6vOp0qb5rFDwrcStRJ9c=?refcode=X_072418_WakeUp_b&amount=25.00&recurring=auto)

clean_body: | | | With the election less than four months away, Team Sherrod is losing ground. "" Here's why: 1. Senate races are tightening all across the country. Here's one recent headline: " Brutal Poll: Democrats' Senate dreams slipping away". Your contribution could be the difference in whether we see more nightmarish headlines like this, or we keep going strong to the finish line. "" 2. A recent poll shows Sherrod is losing ground to his opponent , multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci. 3. A Koch-backed special interest group just announced a six-figure digital ad blitz ...and they are targeting Ohio. If we don't hit our goals, we will have to pull down TV ads, make cuts to our field program, and risk not re-electing Sherrod this fall. We can't let that happen. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks! Team Sherrod | "" "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Detroit and Flint (VIDEO)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Once we wrapped up in Akron, Ohio, we boarded the bus and headed to Detroit. After only the first day, it became clear that this tour was a game changer. We met with local business people, elected of | |
---
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc5562/2716613420/VEsH/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180723_30&utm_campaign=230718_email&utm_source=TR4C&utm_medium=email&utm_content=1") Folks, [I hope you enjoyed the first stop on our Comeback Cities Tour! ](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc5565/2716613420/VEsE/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180723_30&utm_campaign=230718_email&utm_source=TR4C&utm_medium=email&utm_content=2+-+I+hope+you+enjoyed+the+first+stop+on+our") Once we wrapped up in Akron, Ohio, we boarded the bus and headed to Detroit. After only the first day, **it became clear that this tour was a game changer.** We met with local business people, elected officials, and business incubators so that the venture capitalists could learn about the startup activity and investment opportunities right in our backyards. **What really excited us: It was working.** [Watch and share part two of the Comeback Cities Tour >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc5564/2716613420/VEsF/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180723_30&utm_campaign=230718_email&utm_source=TR4C&utm_medium=email&utm_content=3+-+Watch+and+share+part+two+of+the+Comeback") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc5567/2716613420/VEsC/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180723_30&utm_campaign=230718_email&utm_source=TR4C&utm_medium=email&utm_content=4") At every stop -- whether it was the Youngstown Business Incubators, Akron's Bounce Innovation Hub, the transformative Detroit Foundation Hotel, or Skypoint Ventures in Flint -- eye-opening discussions that engaged everyone were being had. Partnerships were forged and ideas exchanged. I was so heartened that one thing kept coming up again and again: **There's more common ground between the heartland and the coasts than many people realize. ** Places like Youngstown, Akron, Detroit, Flint, and South Bend all have individual strengths and resources that can benefit greatly if meaningful connections can be established with places like Silicon Valley, New York City, and Boston. **On this trip, that was exactly what was happening. ** [Watch and share part two of the incredible Comeback Cities Tour now >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc5566/2716613420/VEsD/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180723_30&utm_campaign=230718_email&utm_source=TR4C&utm_medium=email&utm_content=5+-+Watch+and+share+part+two+of+the+incredib") Make sure you're following the journey on [Facebook](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc5569/2716613420/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/timryanforcongress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30"), [Instagram](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc5568/2716613420/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/timjohnryan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-+Instagram&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30"), and [Twitter](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc556b/2716613420/VEsO/ "https://twitter.com/timryan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30"). Stay tuned for part three! Best, \-- Tim [DONATE ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc556a/2716613420/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_comebackcities?refcode=em20180723_30&refcode2=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=9+-+DONATE+rarr&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc556d/2716613420/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=10+-+Receive+Fewer+Emails&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc556c/2716613420/VEsHBA/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=11+-++Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc556f/2716613420/VEsHBw/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=12&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc556e/2716613420/VEsHBg/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=13&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30")

Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc5510/2716613420/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=15+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a921c/5486deaa/29abe299/dcc5513/2716613420/VEsHAw/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=16+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em20180723_30&source=em20180723_30") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Makaiah Mohler, Team Morse
subject: a quick reminder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vkdXhTdAwF1n0zG3UwX4PY7_ssUkto-G3V--pMRV9o8=/g_gG9PItekttSh5030yAx2iMrQWh2r-GsuDlSKEb1zE=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180723_MM_preexhc_all_logo)
Team, we've shared many of the ways Tom McClintock is letting down our district (it's a long and depressing list).
But we want to make sure you don't forget one of the biggest ways he's letting us down: voting repeatedly and relentlessly to sabotage our health care system and put affordable care out of the reach of everyday Americans.
**If you believe our community deserves better, speak up now.**

[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/vkdXhTdAwF1n0zG3UwX4PY7_ssUkto-G3V--pMRV9o8=/qUK7ZGU4s805mNnP9T3oRxDwiIoE1zjvNP2ilgLzIas=?ms=email_20180723)
---

Don't forget: **McClintock voted to strip health care from _300,000 people in our district who live with pre-existing conditions._** That's a tax on being sick.
Don't forget: **McClintock voted for a tax plan which will drive up our premiums and force cuts to Medicare by over half a trillion dollars.** He proudly stands by that vote.
Everyone in our district--and our country--deserves access to affordable, quality health care. But McClintock doesn't seem to believe that. Instead, he's putting the interests of his political party over the well-being of the people he represents.
[_**Sign our petition now to tell Tom McClintock: stop punishing people for being sick.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/vkdXhTdAwF1n0zG3UwX4PY7_ssUkto-G3V--pMRV9o8=/qUK7ZGU4s805mNnP9T3oRxDwiIoE1zjvNP2ilgLzIas=?ms=email_20180723)
Thank you,
Makaiah
Makaiah Mohler
Deputy Campaign Manager
Morse for Congress
[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/vkdXhTdAwF1n0zG3UwX4PY7_ssUkto-G3V--pMRV9o8=/g_gG9PItekttSh5030yAx2iMrQWh2r-GsuDlSKEb1zE=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180723_MM_preexhc_all_contribbutton2)

name: Team Leah
subject: Flush out the swamp
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Meet Leah Vukmir. She stood with Governor Walker to take on the big union bosses. Now, she's running for Senate to stand with President Trump. **
****Meet Leah Vukmir:** She stood with Governor Walker to take on the big union bosses.
Now, she's running for Senate to stand with President Trump.
Together, they'll cut wasteful spending. They'll build the wall. And DRAIN THE SWAMP! But don't take our word for it, hear it from Leah yourself: [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b6440ba792ca4c708e7680c72dd204be&_e=9olbzSqATIq3U8TflVoGx8b6yCmytNjeW_frXzcWrYOCEfSr1SgSIHa2Cwc-8SnOnIm487S_mYRXgbB4dvkMvq4Fo6d8eHkTC47ik4OmqH2JwAWfx3nkScnK63mpaZL8f9QsJ18weWeHG75OqRyUg6A39AmWG7EEb7JOIg3I_VdRS9UkUGzXHOovRIHt9wF5jiUXF03oVNMD1grDT8eo3VSi-hQL-1Qj5uVsBKvgiL3g0Z6_B2DtdqACDW8bttZ1GtUrRfIdwpQw-uETUbfNiQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b6440ba792ca4c708e7680c72dd204be&_e=9olbzSqATIq3U8TflVoGx4M6aZiSJd2VN_W-YIkmy63DxEVNtyPWEkrmRUGbxoX4aH-lHSC1_lKL7sx6_9572DelYgOQ45opvNd8MHFWJmTfmTP3YOu-o-y6JuuMsc8Ce0KGKJMjnguc9gEnfi1ZSV9b60AOf6f4NVgIJihofxuO_uXVe8z5siUHR6E-7y8aWvAnSOQzRyuuAMI9NMhxt7ZBjhsSYWxRTxbUDx8y3AlL2WNlb3zXzR8TNTDYagunUQ1mukBes6ZXrlIBe1P8_Q%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b6440ba792ca4c708e7680c72dd204be&_e=9olbzSqATIq3U8TflVoGx9KSdlpzts37Gw51_f5H5_B3Jv3dbLfZ2hxQD6qbSY8XhY4-92KX_nEhtNlzxpwFRor3298wjfEv3efP67SSdsOIj_dtb324mcUV97cfj9sRdl5mCXt5ucTmdUvyHUMb1z5xmcDB-YQiJLd-OHljf3WYu8zAjF_aR9vhXoA-HajbukAeg7Or-NFUWlAB0T7VsBmWzVtNQgGLCYgKNsgCWvs7_sIPg9IQx8uuWRWVCgMz7xbQ5W4riC3u3iotbucy_A%3D%3D) | Paid for by Leah for Senate

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b6440ba792ca4c708e7680c72dd204be&_e=5FETsmmigj0sL4ZGPOPNIPjN04RNXE_kM3b-es0E-och6yePQmc5VC6X6lwJvNgcOZBQk8FvQvLcT83pyaApETdBRGzcH5Wd16dFGSNIqV7YoNRgK54FhAbJfQjtmOTEQB8mSTm0RfWGxqPwqlLWvNrFneprIBORQ7r8wiXgM9FceQuNs4bnyNhCCwG0yeDTBfjB-wnEBbC60Jv0X36lKcEL4z5bAx08-CFAOjqq9THZzYLKS2PPQ0Vlkd8gkLMf). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics all because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. They literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? Crazy huh? That moment got me started on my mission to fix our state’s education system, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b6440ba792ca4c708e7680c72dd204be&_e=9olbzSqATIq3U8TflVoGx6Bk32e7qZtr2KXphCOSh6slYnjtfoYw3_sJAgdaXKYpqIcJZalGF_e16xPMSdjOnPOyJi0yslUn7uJGrRPoxA3RtcNNJPM8VbS7aSX-WFnZBLrW-j4foP3ppwQC3B60btaNxb5o73vnVcO7vOAIxVoc250qq7-EFvuYCC5uxoSDmRFWjDCRc_bQUGQIt8mcdxAfHTc3DgS5yXzxxXia3e_nBK3_OzukwVS6NlyDRErQByxqMdSoNv7R-BgBG7eLgUMIetjlSYC0TPNbO5Zqr8a4UfzAvyJLg-G7nrUw6TzxyQhdHzGTkyse6eNlo5ypIVM8AP_6KSK8dbWJ1EtHulboV7WvQ9jkXR8a6oE9Tw7E) that you care about? If the past few year’s have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b6440ba792ca4c708e7680c72dd204be&_e=9olbzSqATIq3U8TflVoGx6Bk32e7qZtr2KXphCOSh6t3Kx0OxRB179-8U8gXmrniNwJmj_Xh21-Rq6yO2Mii0bOrOVPDiw7jkXTzU5jDCGJ1SG3REIebbJsm9WrKJbPU1wA86n2sz301KtNRdQH5Z6NKiFI9cZ5IVmLl7T2pHdkHCHIQ6rNt11XWc0mh38f6UcZLeGDfofCGb5SWEZfl_nACBOmv98wXcmOJ4leeUo-of1sjLNEOJ4X6sXsKHMerzdF4HpxulxgJJLw5gm-DmKVX2VfqSxaMaP2n9D2m76WXpfn1WQrbh86tBFEHsPCWe_DvKfg5o3znSM0K0bAQ6MK8Yw9LxCsc4fTHveL4sdPD_tf9y2FDPekA8FBp-P0n) to the status quo with me. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b6440ba792ca4c708e7680c72dd204be&_e=9olbzSqATIq3U8TflVoGx4M6aZiSJd2VN_W-YIkmy63DxEVNtyPWEkrmRUGbxoX4lOs1ZdreY31lnXPyYkzraC6qViPYbMsGaUqLbIw5_Mxz6RLHeBxIhhtGpC5aMQ1ArQgAbq8EkT08jhpO4bESj80fMJmcsydkncc1ffhEDKWbMFom_woHvjsEtI_DA0rJ0XvRcNa4uBytR7dbuf3Gxn1x9WPTnjcNANpZywTR8R4WsLT31RYc8fxfZlzK7iXtXi7GOPKvoIVVPEP2CXzTrQ%3D%3D), and follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b6440ba792ca4c708e7680c72dd204be&_e=9olbzSqATIq3U8TflVoGx9KSdlpzts37Gw51_f5H5_B3Jv3dbLfZ2hxQD6qbSY8X2IcZ_yH4TUySyrNp1G93XHj7laqWzPr2Ze7GPcNp7OtRYh53fvDVZAZmh2VsSrQk_3hZN1_KJ1zMu_48YLeUtjzPYwk31PkfmlIfUETc1TOWyMmfsSGbSpTjxmtEh-0f6DpVDqNjKSibxbC7gusdj8ytRFuZpW0KzmmYhz_3W4ZkQ37_fIDhWVJAivJndX8p5xhVMSjI5tN9QPNFCCmwOw%3D%3D), my team and I share lot’s of great stuff from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [SMS program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b6440ba792ca4c708e7680c72dd204be&_e=9olbzSqATIq3U8TflVoGx6Bk32e7qZtr2KXphCOSh6uhjP3t-lkAK4AGK3yCMabHt617_y4lN94VqH6aKJ-DLGzRWm6IQBuFHxGLnQw73_OKu8-diWAJNOPy54Pz5QH5WN9A9mGET5BBPMwlPAPxKr3pF9JNVRP8DwC_MZKyTTrchTsaEW10SpL2qwXUATSD_nv7LGCtDZSZdJk56gAqRRhF0ZJjFxCYs3KEB4M3ukmuBbAJdt0NBdHiIIekk5a5gptOKx4PMM1OKLcmAChDTSrPA-m4idiIJrFqKGA2G8lrADER_be7qGP_aJ0HKPeZasLJzDQfY0wNv2qnzPbcLmGw0w4bw5ihV5scyh_tXe19Ejs6tQnHTa7fpBhTIDS-zfFyXfx3hPTbH50GPZIxKQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now, if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: A tale of two very different meetings
body:
[1]Bernie Sanders

Sisters And Brothers -

Let me tell you about two different kinds of meetings that took place this
past weekend.

On Friday, along with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, I went to Kansas and held
rallies with two great progressive candidates who are running for
Congress. In Wichita, according to local media reports, more than 4,000
people joined us at a rally with James Thompson.

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/254?t=1001&akid=55%2E150750%2EDVlwSZ ][IMG]
The rally in Wichita with Bernie, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and James
Thompson.

Then in Kansas City, at our rally for Brent Welder, the convention center
was so crowded the staff had to remove a wall in the middle while the
event was going on to let more people in. These were incredible crowds
coming out in more than 100-degree weather to participate in our political
revolution. And, yes, this was Kansas where Republicans control almost
everything.

There was quite a different event in Columbus, Ohio. Two hundred and fifty
wealthy invited Democratic donors and Wall Street insiders came together
at a gathering hosted by a real estate billionaire. Why were they there?
The headline on an NBC News story tells it all:

"Sanders' wing of the party terrifies moderate Dems. Here's how they plan
to stop it. Party members and fundraisers gathered for an invitation-only
event to figure out how to counteract the rising progressive movement."

What are they concerned about? That our ideas, such as Medicare for all,
tuition-free public colleges and universities, a $15/hr minimum wage and
progressive taxation are now mainstream positions.

Make no mistake about it. The gathering in Columbus was not simply a
social event. The corporate Democrats are plotting how to defeat
progressives the only way they know how — with big money. But you’ve shown
that, together, we can overcome their brand of pay-to-play politics.

Brent Welder is one of those candidates the political and financial
establishment wants to beat. But if we’re with him, he’s going to win:

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/254?t=1002&akid=55%2E150750%2EDVlwSZ ]Can you split a
$3 donation
between Brent Welder’s campaign and my work campaigning for progressive
candidates like Brent who will work with me to transform America? I would
not ask if it was not so important.

The big money interests should be scared. During the past two weekends, I
have been traveling across the country and what I’ve seen has been
remarkable. This weekend we were in Kansas. The previous weekend I was in
Minnesota where we held two rallies for Congressman Keith Ellison who is
running for Attorney General there. We packed “First Avenue” in
Minneapolis where the crowd heard not only from myself and Keith but an
inspiring speech by Ady Barkan. Diagnosed with ALS, Ady has dedicated the
remainder of his life to fighting for Medicare for all and other
progressive goals. It would be impossible to hear Ady and not be inspired.

Later in Duluth, an area many in the national media would like to write
off as “Trump Country,” we spoke to a packed auditorium of progressives
hungry for changes.

We then drove to Eau Claire, Wisconsin, where the next morning we held a
rally with Senator Tammy Baldwin. Once again, in a conservative part of
the state, the turnout was great. Tammy is one of the strong progressive
members of the Senate. That is why the Koch Brothers are spending millions
to try and defeat her.

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/254?t=1003&akid=55%2E150750%2EDVlwSZ ][IMG]
The rally in Eau Claire with Bernie and Senator Tammy Baldwin.

Later that day, we held a rally in the UAW hall in Janesville, Wisconsin
with Randy Bryce, a union ironworker who is running a great grassroots
campaign for Congress in the seat currently held by Speaker Paul Ryan.
Wouldn't that be a great victory for Randy to win the seat currently held
by the Republican Speaker? And, from what I saw in Janesville, he can do
it.

From Wisconsin, we flew to Pittsburgh where I addressed the American
Federation of Teachers (AFT) national convention. While in Pittsburgh, I
also held a rally with progressive John Fetterman, who won an upset
victory in the Pennsylvania Lieutenant Governor Democratic Primary. At the
rally Summer Lee and Sara Innamorato, two young Democratic Socialists in
Pittsburgh, talked about the recent landslide victories they won as they
unseated two long-term, veteran incumbents. Their campaigns brought
together hundreds of volunteers who knocked on doors to fuel the
progressive victory.

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/254?t=1004&akid=55%2E150750%2EDVlwSZ ][IMG]
The rally in Pittsburgh with Bernie, John Fetterman, Summer Lee and Sara
Innamorato.

These are the type of campaigns we need to run if we are going to win. And
right now one progressive, grassroots Democratic candidate needs your
support.

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/254?t=1005&akid=55%2E150750%2EDVlwSZ ]Can you split a
$3 donation
between Brent Welder’s campaign and my work campaigning for progressive
candidates like Brent who will work with me to transform America? I would
not ask if it was not so important.

As Alexandria, Summer, and Sara have demonstrated, we can win seemingly
impossible campaigns if we run on issues that speak to the needs of
working people while harnessing the grassroots energy to drive our
campaigns forward.

There is a reason why the corporate Democrats are getting nervous. And
that's because we are making real progress in transforming the party and
the nation.

Let's keep going forward.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/254?t=1006&akid=55%2E150750%2EDVlwSZ ]DONATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.berniesanders.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=55%2E150750%2EDVlwSZ

Voters across Georgia will cast their ballots to decide who Stacey will face in November. **[Will you donate before the runoff to show our opponent that Team Abrams is ready to turn Georgia blue?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa90d/34a064cc/bfcce24/70ebcac/1236341202/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzIzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-gop-runoff?refcode=IE072318-full")** We have spent the past year building a diverse coalition that truly looks like Georgia. That is what brought us to victory in May, and it's what will allow us to beat whichever candidate we are up against in November. But we _have_ to keep building. For the families all across Georgia who are struggling without access to affordable health care. For the worker who picks up a late shift to make ends meet and finds rest only on the bus to their second job. For the child who truly believes that their future is limitless; and for their parents who are doing everything in their power to make sure that's true. **We are entering the final stretch of the race. body:

Team, The far-right is dead-set on unseating Tom with a rubber stamp for their extreme agenda. [_**(You can chip in help us stop the far-right and re-elect Tom right here!)**_](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.23_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _Just take a look at the far-right 's alarming momentum in recent weeks:_
* One of our opponents went up on TV with an ad touting her support for the far-right's extreme, partisan agenda.
* We learned that **a super PAC is dropping _$50,000_ to boost one of Tom's far-right opponents.**
* Tom is STILL the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the ENTIRE HOUSE -- so the far-right is still set on defeating him this November.

Here's the good news: Our grassroots supporters rallied last week to help us fight back against the far-right, their mega-donors, and their Super PACs. **After all, here at Team O 'Halleran, when we're facing a challenge, we don't get worried -- we get organized. And if this entire grassroots team comes together, $5 and $10 at a time, we can stop the far-right and re-elect Tom.** [**We 'll send Tom back to Congress so he can keep fighting for Arizona families -- but we can't do it without you. Please consider making a donation to help us keep AZ-01 blue today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. name: Geoff Burgan, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Why I'm with Andrew
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37d9/9e00690/59be1f6c/2402f569/1232418337/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180723_ABday3_engg_gq_act__GB_ettx&source=em18_180723_ABday3_engg_gq_act__GB_ettx")
Friends,

Andrew's the kind of man who will always put other people first and, through this entire campaign, he's been working relentlessly because he knows so many Floridians are counting on him to bring their voices to the Governor's mansion.

So, the team here decided we wanted to do something special for his birthday -- and of course, we want your help too!

**[Andrew's birthday is coming up, and we're putting together a card for him -- will you sign it to help us make Andrew's birthday special?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37d9/9e00690/59be1f6c/2402f568/1232418337/VEsE/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/sign-andrew-s-birthday-card?gpsid=13_55_2241&source=em18_180723_ABday3_engg_gq_act__GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180723_ABday3_engg_gq_act__GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Andrewrsquos+birthday+is+coming+up+and+w")**

Since day one of this campaign, Andrew's been busy fighting for the people who have been told they don't belong. Peter,

Here at EMILY's List, news breaks fast.

It's exciting, but it can be hard to keep up -- it feels like every day we have election results or updates from our candidates to share.

Signing up to receive texts from our team ensures you'll be the first to know what's going on.

Not to mention you'll get exclusive perks like our EMILY's List phone backgrounds, advance notice when new merch hits the store, fun quizzes, and more.

And you'll get to hear from me -- I'm Olivia, and I run the mobile program here at EMILY's List. I can't tell you how excited I am to help fill seats up and down the ballot with our women -- and help Democrats flip the House and Senate.

**[Text JOIN to 47717 to receive texts from EMILY's List and get updates about our women, their races, and the many ways you can support them.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4d47/24c69fd9/2781f4121/1885fa25/918406350/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180124_website_homepage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Text+JOIN+to+47717+to+receive+texts+from&utm_campaign=WQENES55N_digital_email_20180723_SMSFirstToKnow_inact&source=WQENES55N_digital_email_20180723_SMSFirstToKnow_inact")**

Don't worry -- we won't text you too much, only when we have really exciting or important news to share.

Thanks,

Olivia Noble
Digital Engagement Director, EMILY's List

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Did you know we cut income taxes?
body:
This year, we cut income tax rates, saving Vermonters $30 million. |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=15af3acc91&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2356ed45ce&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=344d9316ed&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c112f0c148&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=cb64a6894d&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=cb64a6894d&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Friend,
---
| We achieved something historic this year. **For the first time in memory, we were able to cut income tax rates, saving Vermonters over $30 million.** Yes, you read that right.

We were able to _**cut**_ taxes this year!

When Congress passed the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, I asked the Tax Department to determine its impact on Vermonters. What their analysis found was that, while these changes will lower federal taxes for most Vermonters, due to the complexity of our system and its connection to the federal calculation, it was going to raise income taxes on Vermont taxpayers.

**If we had taken no action or made no changes to our laws, about half of Vermonters – primarily working families with kids – would have paid a total of $30 million more in Vermont income tax.
**
So, to prevent this from happening, I proposed that we simplify and cut rates. **Not only does this mean that everyone’s rates were reduced across the board, but it makes us more competitive with our neighbors to the West in New York, and it helps Vermonters keep more of what they earn. **

We can’t make Vermont more affordable overnight, but actions like this are steps in the right direction. Coupled with our efforts to exempt most seniors from paying income tax on their Social Security benefits, holding the line on residential property tax rates for two straight years, as well as passing two budgets with zero general fund tax increases, it’s clear we’re doing everything we can to make Vermont a more affordable, prosperous state for us all.

To help us continue this progress, don’t forget to vote in the upcoming Republican Primary on, or before, August 14th. I’d be honored to have your support! Sincerely,

Phil Scott

---
| [Request an Absentee Ballot Here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=fc7a864e04&e=19cebfe173 "Request an Absentee Ballot Here")
---

You can [update your preferences](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=cb64a6894d)

name: Kaine Communications | Ian Sams
subject: Trump's favorite Senator? Yikes, no thanks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Tim's opponent, Corey Stewart, has debuted a new line: | [**" I will be Donald Trump's favorite Senator" - Corey Stewart**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1231/3e0906/695a592f/3e35c006/2554428855/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180723_1_FR_IS_Favorite-Senator-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+ldquoI+will+be+Donald+Trumprsquos+favori&utm_campaign=20180723_1_FR_IS_Favorite-Senator-LDND&source=20180723_1_FR_IS_Favorite-Senator-LDND")
---
Ew.

President Trump has a hard enough time finding support among elected Republicans, so getting someone like Corey in the Senate would be a dream come true for him.

Corey would be a rubber stamp for Donald Trump's extreme agenda, despite Virginians and Americans wanting their leaders to be a real check on his actions - from separating families to attacking Planned Parenthood.

**So here 's what I'm willing to wager:** Donald Trump may favor Corey Stewart (_we have a Trump tweet to prove he does_), but in the race between Kaine and Stewart, Virginians will take Kaine's inclusive vision and willingness to stand up for our values.

**But here 's the thing, Derek, we still need your support. We're in the middle of building a huge campaign operation that's focused on exactly what Tim cares about: strengthening the bench of Virginia volunteers, talent, and progressive infrastructure in the Commonwealth for years to come.**

Can you chip in? It will help make that vision a reality - and will let Tim focus on representing us, not Donald Trump. Any amount is appreciated:
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1231/3e0906/695a592f/3e35c01b/2554428855/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180723_1_FR_IS_Favorite-Senator-LDND_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180723_1_FR_IS_Favorite-Senator-LDND&source=20180723_1_FR_IS_Favorite-Senator-LDND")

clean_body: | | Tim's opponent, Corey Stewart, has debuted a new line: | "" Ew. President Trump has a hard enough time finding support among elected Republicans, so getting someone like Corey in the Senate would be a dream come true for him. Corey would be a rubber stamp for Donald Trump's extreme agenda, despite Virginians and Americans wanting their leaders to be a real check on his actions - from separating families to attacking Planned Parenthood. So here 's what I'm willing to wager: Donald Trump may favor Corey Stewart (we have a Trump tweet to prove he does), but in the race between Kaine and Stewart, Virginians will take Kaine's inclusive vision and willingness to stand up for our values. But here 's the thing, Derek, we still need your support. We're in the middle of building a huge campaign operation that's focused on exactly what Tim cares about: strengthening the bench of Virginia volunteers, talent, and progressive infrastructure in the Commonwealth for years to come. Can you chip in? It will help make that vision a reality - and will let Tim focus on representing us, not Donald Trump. Any amount is appreciated: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for being a part of this. Ian Sams Communications Director Kaine for Virginia "" "" * | "" "" ""

Good evening, This Wednesday is our weekly CallHub meeting, where we will be making phone calls and reaching out to voters from 6:00 to 7:30 P.M. at our Campaign Headquarters (2020 S. McClintock Rd, Suite 104, Tempe, AZ 85282). If you are unable to come in, you can also join us remotely from home! Please remember to bring your phone and laptop/tablet! There will be pizza and drinks! If you need help setting CallHub up or any questions about events feel free to reach out to [sam@kelliward.com](mailto:sam@kelliward.com) or (623) 205-8541. Below are events that need YOUR help! **AZ American African Republican Committee (2 volunteers to help with the swag table)**
Thursday, July 26
6:45 – 8:15pm
3501 N 24th St, Phoenix, AZ 85016, USA
We need volunteers to help with our Swag table for this event! **Maricopa Republican Club (2 volunteers to help with the swag table)**
Thursday, July 26
7:15 – 9:15pm
Rancho El Dorado Pkwy, Maricopa, AZ 85138, USA **LD 16 Candidate Debate- Clean Elections (2 volunteers to pass out palm cards)**
Monday, July 30
6:00 – 7:00pm
Four Points by Sheraton at Phoenix Mesa Gateway Airport
6850 E Williams Field Rd, Mesa, AZ 85212, USA
